description: Leading penetration testing engagements for enterprise clients. Conducting vulnerability assessments, red team operations, and security architecture reviews. Mentoring junior analysts and developing internal security tools.

Designed and implemented security solutions for cloud infrastructure. Performed code audits, developed SIEM correlation rules, and managed incident response procedures. Achieved 40% reduction in security incidents.
Full-stack web development with focus on secure coding practices. Built RESTful APIs, implemented OAuth2 authentication flows, and conducted security testing for web applications.
